text:
Erwin Smith was the 13th Commander of the Survey Corps and the creator of the Long-Distance Enemy Scouting Formation in the Attack on Titan manga and anime. Other articles with this name include:
Erwin Smith (Chapter) - The twenty-sixth chapter of the Attack on Titan manga.
Erwin Smith (Junior High Manga) - Erwin's counterpart in the Attack on Titan: Junior High manga.
Erwin Smith: The 57th Exterior Scouting Mission, Part 4 - The twentieth episode of the Attack on Titan anime.
Erwin Smith (Chibi Theater) - Erwin's incarnation from Chibi Theater: Fly, Cadets, Fly!.
Erwin Smith (Junior High Anime) - Erwin's counterpart in the Attack on Titan: Junior High anime.
